notes: v0.19.0 — REAL ONLINE PvP. The 3D cockpit DOGFIGHT prototype is gone; we're back to the core PulseWave arena. The MULTIPLAYER tile now opens proper matchmaking: enter the queue, server pairs you with another waiting player, same arena + same music + same beat-driven hazards on both sides. Most kills when the track ends wins. Server is in Helsinki (Hetzner); no installs, no port forwarding, no Steam needed — just click MULTIPLAYER. SOLO/PRACTICE/BOSS RUSH/RIFT untouched.
